title: Sanji’s Group Reaches Zou
description: On pages 5–9, this part focuses on sanji’s group reaches zou within the The Curly Hat Pirates Arrive storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Jack- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RARGH!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: A Barbarian stands before them! Jack the drought!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I see... the ancient form of the Zou-Zou* No mi, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's a rare delicacy you've eaten there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's funny, I didn't think there were any true warriors left on this island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Y'all should've left back when the mangy mutt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: took the courtesy of showing you the exit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We've got enough warriors here to rival any of your big nations.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oi, Bepo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You lot are still in my care;

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you don't want to fight, that's no skin off my back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That is definitely not how it's gonna go down, master!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I may have become a pirate, but this place is still my home!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hell yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Our friend's home!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well I'll be damned...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: for 5 days and nights, through sunrise and sunset...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: with nary a pause or lull, the fighting continued.

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: ship after ship of reinforcements came. We were unable to halt the advance of Jack's troops.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Our enemies may as well have been an endless army of zombies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nevertheless, we gradually began to gain the upper hand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There was but one member of the enemy army that we were unable to suppress.

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Jack himself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Calling him a monster...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: does not do him justice.

summary: Sanji’s Group Reaches Zou: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
